title: AN ACT NAMING THE 2ND MANDAUE-MACTAN BRIDGE IN THE PROVINCE OF CEBU AS THE MARCELO B. FERNAN BRIDGE

chunks.text:
S. No. 1641 H. No. 7928 / 96 OG No. 48, 7688 (Nov. 27, 2000)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8795, June 27, 2000 ]

AN ACT NAMING THE 2ND MANDAUE-MACTAN BRIDGE IN THE PROVINCE OF CEBU AS THE MARCELO B. FERNAN BRIDGE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The 2

nd

Mandaue-Mactan Bridge situated in the Province of Cebu is hereby named as the Marcelo B. Fernan Bridge.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M.

DRILON

(Sgd.)

MANUEL B. VILLAR

JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act which originated in the House of Representative was finally passed

by the Senate and the House of Representatives on December 22, 2000 and May 29, 2000 respectively.

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

(Sgd.)

ROBERTO P.

NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of

Representatives

Approved: June 27, 2000.

(Sgd.) JOSEPH E.

ESTRADA

President of the Philippines
